description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded dome with a prominent central ridge running from front to back, giving it a reinforced appearance. The front is characterized by a T-shaped visor opening, reminiscent of Mandalorian or medieval knight designs, providing both visibility and facial protection. The sides display large, rectangular ear covers with metallic-looking attachment points, suggesting additional protection or modularity. The rear of the helmet is solid and smooth, with a rectangular vent or detail at the base, and the surface shows subtle wear and scuff marks, indicating use or a matte finish. The helmet is predominantly a dark, metallic color, with no visible graphics or branding. Its construction appears to be primarily metal or a high-strength composite, suitable for urban tactical or protective use.
description: A dark, robust helmet with a central ridge, T-shaped visor, and solid side and rear protection, featuring a matte, slightly worn finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped visor and central ridge, emphasizing facial protection.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlights the smooth dome, side ear covers, and attachment points.
description_view_2: Direct rear view reveals the solid back and rectangular detail at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite rear three-quarter view again shows the side ear cover and smooth, rounded back.
